mnemonics.title: CUDA Result Return Steps: AWC
mnemonics.content: AWC - Allocate (cudaMalloc device memory), Write (kernel threads write results to device memory), Copy (cudaMemcpy DeviceToHost brings results back). Think: 'AWC -- Always Write then Copy' for every CUDA result.

mnemonics.title: Five Result Techniques: DARUP
mnemonics.content: DARUP - Device memory + cudaMemcpy (standard), Atomic operations (simple but slow), Reduction in shared memory (fast for scalars), Unified memory with cudaMallocManaged (no explicit copy), Pinned memory with cudaHostAlloc (faster DMA). Remember: 'DARUP -- Data Always Returns Using Parallelism.'
